All of this I could have lived with happily if we weren't paying 5-star prices.

reviews.title: Great location but lousy room!
reviews.text: Lights and air-con in the lobby all switched off! We were not allowed to check in early, and they checked us into a wrong room which we had requested earlier on! From our room we could only see a small part of the river and our room was facing the dirty buildings! The staff was not friendly and spoke rudely to us when we requested to change the rooms on the phone! The windows in the room were really dirty and dusty, the furniture were also old and dirty! While the TV was old and blurry...
reviews.positives: Location

reviews.positives: Great rooftop bar food and drinks. Great buffet breakfast

reviews.title: Very Dated
reviews.text:
The hotel is very well located, which is a big plus. However, it’s definitely starting to show its age. The facilities are worn, and the pool area needs attention there was visible green mold on the tiles and walls, and we even saw pigeon feathers in the water. The floor around the pool is extremely slippery when wet; we were honestly surprised no one got hurt. Pool towels were also quite old.
The fitness center is very basic, with limited equipment, no air conditioning, and it’s located in a hallway, so there’s no privacy. We also noticed that the pool seemed to be used for swimming lessons for non-guests, which made us feel uncomfortable during the short time we spent there.
In the room, the furniture wasn’t very comfortable, and a safety concern was that the windows didn’t have locks. While it's nice to be able to open them, it’s risky especially if you're traveling with kids and staying on a high floor, as we were.
The kids club also felt neglected, with broken and dirty toys.

Overall, if you’re mainly after a good location and a clean room, this hotel delivers. But if you're expecting 5-star facilities and service, it may fall short it feels more like a 3.5 or 4-star experience.

Chúng tôi luôn mong muốn mang đến cho khách hàng trải nghiệm tốt nhất và việc nhân viên có thái độ không phù hợp như vậy là điều chúng tôi không thể chấp nhận. Chúng tôi sẽ tăng cường đào tạo cho nhân viên về cách giao tiếp và phục vụ khách hàng một cách chuyên nghiệp và lịch sự hơn.

Một lần nữa, chúng tôi xin lỗi vì sự bất tiện này và rất mong bạn sẽ cho chúng tôi cơ hội để phục vụ bạn tốt hơn trong tương lai.

Trân trọng,

Ban Quản Lý Khách sạn

reviews.title: Does not seem like a 5 Star hotel
reviews.text:
We recently stayed at TTC Imperial in Hue during October 2024 and had a mixed experience.
 The room was spacious, but I was disappointed to find a small cockroach in the bathroom. My sister's room had an even larger cockroach. The windows were also dirty and cloudy, which made the room feel less inviting. These cleanliness issues raised concerns about the overall hygiene of the hotel.
Amenities: "We didn't use the pool, but from what we saw, it appeared to be in decent condition. The breakfast buffet was average.
 Service: "Unfortunately, the customer service at TTC Imperial didn't meet our expectations. We found the staff at dining room to be less attentive compared to our previous stay at Melia Vinpearl. However, receptionists were helpful though.
 Additional observations: "The elevators were hot and stuffy.
 * Overall rating: 2/5 stars (based on the cleanliness, customer service issues, and lack of air conditioning in the elevators) 
We wouldn't come back here again.
reviews.response:
Dear M.
Thank you for taking the time to share your feedback following your recent stay at TTC Imperial Hotel Hue. We sincerely apologize for the issues you encountered, as it is clear we did not meet your expectations in terms of cleanliness, service, and overall experience.

We are truly sorry for the cleanliness issues you mentioned, particularly the unwelcome discovery of cockroaches in both your and your sister's rooms, as well as the cloudy windows. Please rest assured that this is not reflective of our usual standards, and we will immediately address these concerns with our housekeeping team to prevent any recurrence.

We deeply regret that your stay was not reflective of the 5-star experience we aim to provide, and we understand your decision not to return. However, we truly appreciate your feedback as it helps us improve, and we hope that you might consider giving us another opportunity in the future.

Best regards,

Hotel Management

reviews.title: Good, but outdated
reviews.text:
Overall we felt this hotel was a throwback from the 1960s, and not in a good way. The lobby was spacious and imposing, but the space was not used very well. The reception desk is tucked away on the right hand side, while the concierge is lost in amongst some seemingly useless tables and chairs. The balcony above, apparently popular in colonial days, is useleless and old looking. 

Our room was oddly laid out, with outdated fixtures and fittings, televisions and appliances. The bathroom door was carved with holes in it, and therefore offered no privacy whatsoever. The bed was comfortable, and the view from our 10th story window was spectacular. 

The sky bar on the 16 floor was okay, but again in need of modernisation. We came to the hotel during a quiet period so there were lots of staff lurking about with not much to do.
reviews.positives: Location, staff, view

reviews.title: Excellent
reviews.positives: Our room was large with a great view. Bathroom had a separate shower stall, not over the bathtub, but the bathroom was quite small. Buffet breakfast was huge and there was indoor or outdoor seating which was nice. Lovely staff always greeted us whenever we encountered them.
reviews.negatives: Shower was a spout directly overhead, could do with a better option.

reviews.title: Nice room, poor food
reviews.text: Enjoyable stay but the evening dinner was very disappointing. Possibly the worst food we had in Vietnam. Breakfast was excellent though.
reviews.positives: View, Pool, Deal

reviews.title: Very good hotel. The staff made it exceptional.
reviews.positives: The hotel lobby is huge and would have made it feel more cold and impersonal, but Van Duc's warmth, friendliness, and attentiveness made all the difference. His greetings every time we came in or went out made us feel very welcome at the hotel. The room and amenities were on par with other higher end hotels that we stayed at, so we were happy with the facilities. The hotel is also very conveniently located close to the river and the walking street. We had no regrets with our choice of TTC.

reviews.title: First Class Infrastructure but Poor Management
reviews.text:
The lobby is an ornate mess smelling of smoke. The concierge was extremely unhelpful and recommended that we eat at the hotel cafe when we asked where we could try the best local food. 
The rooms and restaurants are furnished like five star establishments, but the maintenance and management leave much to be desired.

reviews.title: Recommend 💯
reviews.positives: Excellent! And the breakfast was really good! Amazing spacious room, bath tub, good air con, very good location
reviews.negatives: Just the swimming pool was busy with children having classes. And there are just four sun beds, boy portable.

reviews.title: Five Star?
reviews.text: On the plus side, the facilities are nice and grand, in that dark, depressing, communist block kind of way, and the room and bathroom were large and nice. But the service is what keeps this from being a 5-star hotel. The small annoyances add up, like the bartender who had never heard of a vodka martini. He turned off the background music in the "King's Panorama bar", instead turning on the TV so he and the rest of the staff could watch their favorite local soap opera at full volume. Or the chef at the breakfast buffet, who leaned over the counter in front of me, cutting me off in order to serve himself a bacon sandwich, which he promptly chomped down on right there. I was quoted two different prices (both highly inflated) for the same tour when I visited the concierge at different times, and pushed to take more tours whenever I had a free minute. Not really the kind of desperate money grubbing I expect from a five star hotel. I never saw pool staff during my stay, there was no food offered in the mini bar, the computers in the lobby are very old... Basically it was a disappointing experience, and I hope the management will know that my criticisms are born of a genuine desire to help the hotel to improve, and will not reply to my review with the excuses and defensiveness I have read in responses to other customer feedback.

reviews.title: It's okay...
reviews.text:
Stayed 3 nights in 2 executive rooms..  Mixed feelings about this hotel. 
The pros - Spacious rooms with good views of Perfume river.  Good Location.  Reasonable sized pool, great view from bar.  Good breakfast. Comfortable beds.
The cons - below average dinner on 16th floor restaurant, the staff really hung around the table, it was not relaxing..  The restaurant was deserted so maybe the proper chef wasn't working that night. There is a late night casino/gaming facility on the top floor which cheapens the place.  Forget the gym, it's not air-conditioned.  If you are on the exec floor don't expect much from the free afternoon tea - it is literally one cup of tea - they wouldn't even substitute for a cup of coffee which seemed rigid. It was okay, not great.
reviews.response:

Thank you for sharing your feedback about your recent stay at Imperial Hotel.

We appreciate your honest review. We're glad you enjoyed the spacious rooms, beautiful river views, and the convenient location. Your positive feedback about the breakfast and the pool is also encouraging.

We understand your concerns about the dining experience at the 16th-floor restaurant, the air-conditioned gym, and the late-night casino. We will take your feedback into consideration to improve our services and facilities.

We apologize for any inconvenience caused by the casino. We will review our operations to ensure a more serene environment for all our guests.

We hope to have the opportunity to welcome you back to Imperial Hotel in the future, where we will strive to provide an even more enjoyable experience.

Sincerely,

Hotel Management

reviews.title: Good VFM at Agoda price but not a 5 star hotel
reviews.text:
Mixed views about this Hotel.

At the rate offered by Agoda it was certainly good value for money.  However this is not a 5 star hotel for many reasons.  I am somewhats shocked that it is classed as a 5 star hotel:
- the fridge was not cold, it was replaced and that was not cold
- the curtains could not be closed to keep out the sun either in the middle or at the ends
- a microwave was used to warm crepes in the restaurant
- getting a jug of hot water was a difficult task in the restaurant
- the curtain tie back hooks were loose
- the shower varied from hot to mild
- I was left at reception for some ten minutes to discuss above before attended to

the above should not happen in a 5 star hotel. On discussing the matter with a Manager, whilst courteous, there was no appreciation of this fact ie: the water systems was relaid as saying that was the system and could not be changed, the curtains being closed was not seen as an issue.

As I say I am not complaining about the price I paid but if I had paid the rack rate/5 star price then I would have been very disappointed.

reviews.title: Nice hotel but not impressed with front desk
reviews.text: This hotel is lovely but do not waste your money on a junior suite, rather just a deluxe city or river view. The suite is two completely separate rooms so the deluxe actually feels larger and still has a nice sitting area. We did have trouble checking in, a lot of confusion and they tried to put us in the wrong room. As an apology they said they were upgrading us to a better suite, that never happened. Then when we requested to move to a deluxe, rather than the junior, again a lot of commotion and we felt as if we were bothering them. We were quite upset about the front desk service but the manager showed up two days later with an apology and a complimentary lunch. Overall a lovely hotel, great amenities, good restaurants and an incredible breakfast buffet.

the hotel is ok for the price, the room is decent and the tv big! if you want to explore the old quarter, then it's location is great as you can walk almost everywhere.
the hotel has good aircon, shower and bathroom is good and staff polite. breakfast is rather good, if basic.
it gets noisy very early in this part of town, so if you want to sleep till noon, perhaps this is not the best location.

Jacuzzi and steam bath small and never available during almost all my stay, drink list offered for breakfast very limited (or need to pay some extra fees).

reviews.title: Exceptional

reviews.title: Imperial Hotel - Review
reviews.text: Generally the Hotel was very clean and well presented. Staff didn't speak good English and it was difficult to make them understand. I suppose a common thread throughout SE Asia. For the money we paid, it was worth the luxury but they need to do something about the open smoking in the hotel or restrict it to certain areas. The internet and computers didn't work most days. Neither did the toaster at Breakfast. Very small things really.
reviews.positives: The hotel was in a good spot, handy to the restaurant scene, supermarket (across the bridge) Markets (also across the bridge. The hotel was large and open.
reviews.negatives: They allowed people to smoke openly in the restaurants and foyer area. Very annoying when you are not a smoker. Staff should speak better or more english than they did especially for a so called 5 star Hotel. We weren't overly impressed with the Hotel or the staff. More choices should be available in the Restaurants or for breakfast. It catered very much to the Korean market. And buy a decent toaster.....

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.positives: This hotel was our favourite during our Vietnam trip. The staff were friendly and gave such warm greetings each day. Our room had exceptional views of the river and city, was spotless and serviced daily. The buffet breakfast was one of the best we have experienced in our travels. We would absolutely stay here again! :)

The room was quite spacious, well appointed and the bed was comfy with plenty of pillows and soft sheets.  The bathroom had a bidet and a nice sized tub with plenty of hot water and good pressure and lots of good toiletries.  The towels were nicely adequate. The restaurant on the 16th floor had a great view of the city and the portions were large and quite tasty.  Van Duc, the concierge, did a great job of arranging tours and transportation to Hoi An.

reviews.title: Clean, central location.
reviews.text:
The hotel is in a convenient location. Just a short walk to Trang Tien Bridge to experience the nightlife right in the center of the beautiful city of Hue. Anyone who loves sweet food can visit the famous Che Hem shop nearby, and late at night after enjoying the special flavors, you can fill up with 2 delicious Huế-style bánh mì at the O Tho bánh mì shop right next to the hotel. 
The bedroom is clean and beautiful with a city and river view. At night, if you want to relax, you just need to pull the curtains and look out to the starry sky, admiring the tranquil river and the enchanting beauty of Hue.
The water in the bathroom is a strong point of this hotel. The water pressure is so strong that it feels like you are standing under a waterfall washing away all dirt and fatigue. It's wonderful!
The staff is very friendly and gentle. I met two male staff members, and they were very responsible in helping me find a room when I arrived at the hotel a day early at 11 PM.
The downside of the hotel is breakfast; the menu is the same every day, and the taste is not very good. The dessert did not maintain its cold temperature, so it had a smell in the scorching summer heat.
The Wi-Fi was weak, and it was only after I had to report it to the reception for the second time after two days that they came to fix it, and the Wi-Fi became very good. The first female staff member I reported this to forgot to note it down. It was only when I reported it to a male staff member that the result was very satisfactory.
This is a good hotel. I hope they will address these minor issues to improve the quality of service. I would still like to return here when I have the chance to come back to Hue, but I will have breakfast outside the hotel. Because Hue is a food paradise, improving breakfast service is something the hotel should do.
reviews.response:
Xin chào Chị Lan,

Chúng tôi rất cảm ơn bạn đã dành thời gian để chia sẻ những trải nghiệm và nhận xét chi tiết về kỳ nghỉ của bạn tại khách sạn của chúng tôi. Chúng tôi rất vui khi biết rằng bạn đánh giá cao vị trí thuận tiện của khách sạn, sự sạch sẽ và đẹp đẽ của phòng ngủ, cùng với view tuyệt vời nhìn ra thành phố và dòng sông.

Chúng tôi xin lỗi về những điểm chưa làm bạn hài lòng, đặc biệt là về bữa sáng và vấn đề liên quan đến wifi. Chúng tôi đã ghi nhận ý kiến của bạn về thực đơn bữa sáng và sẽ xem xét để cải thiện cả hương vị và sự đa dạng của các món ăn. Về vấn đề wifi, chúng tôi rất tiếc về sự bất tiện mà bạn gặp phải và đã có các biện pháp khắc phục để đảm bảo tình trạng này không xảy ra trong tương lai

 Chúng tôi rất mong được đón tiếp bạn trở lại trong tương lai và hy vọng có cơ hội để phục vụ bạn tốt hơn. Xin cảm ơn bạn đã lựa chọn khách sạn của chúng tôi và chia sẻ ý kiến quý báu của bạn.

Also, they are over eager to sell you the airport pick up ($20 vs. $12.25 for a meter taxi). I called for early checkin and they tried to negotiate that they would let me have early check in if I used the hotel's airport pick up, even saying that their car was the same price as a taxi. They did let me check in early in the end, but wouldnt promise anything ahead of time if i took a taxi. With all that in mind, it is very reasonably priced for the location and quality of rooms.

reviews.title: A lot of great but 2 major letdowns
reviews.text:
Our first gripe was the fact that there were no umbrellas around the pool area. The pool is lovely, however the 5 sun lounges were out in full sun. To sit in the shade you need to sit on hard, uncomfortable, metal, upright chairs with no cushions. As it was hot, there was no comfortable spot to sit and read a book etc by the pool. The pool area was not staffed so there wasn’t any opportunity to order food or drinks. 

Secondly, for a hotel of that size, the food options were very limited. Very small room service menu which was underwhelming and the only other option for dinner was the restaurant. This seemed very formal and lacked any atmosphere. The bar at the top was very cosy with amazing views but again lacked any food options other than 5 different types of pastries. Breakfast however was very good. 
The room was spacious with excellent views but the pool and food choices really let it the whole place down.

Thank you for your detailed feedback. We are pleased to hear that you found many aspects of your stay enjoyable, including the great views from your spacious room and our excellent breakfast.

However, we sincerely apologize that the pool area and our dining options did not meet your expectations. Your comments are very important to us, and we are truly sorry that these two areas were major letdowns.

We have immediately taken your feedback to our team. We understand your frustration with the lack of shaded and comfortable seating at the pool and the absence of poolside service. We are actively reviewing our setup and services to address this, as we want our guests to be able to relax and enjoy the pool area comfortably.

We also regret that our dining options were limited and lacked the atmosphere you were looking for. We will be reviewing our room service and restaurant menus and exploring ways to add more casual dining options, including light food choices at our ro

reviews.title: Very good
reviews.text: The hotel's location is right in the city center, very convenient for activities. The hotel looks old but is clean, and the decoration in the room is very typical of Hue, with a beautiful view overlooking the Trang Tien Bridge. My family booked 4 rooms, and each room had a view of the Perfume River, which we really liked. However, the bathroom did not have a detachable showerhead, which was a bit inconvenient for families with children; the hallway was overly scented with perfume, with a strong smell like in a karaoke bar, which made it feel less luxurious; instead, using essential oils could create a more comfortable atmosphere for guests. Breakfast was also very diverse but not delicious; many staff members here were not open or cheerful, looking like they were "forced" to work, which made their expressions very tense and tired; the large pool is quite deep but has no lifeguard, and guests are left to manage their own children. Everything else I could overlook, but the staff's lack of openness in service is something the hotel should address. Thank you!

reviews.title: Hotel Review
reviews.text:
I arrived at the hotel around 12pm, but unfortunately, the front desk staff couldn’t find my booking and asked me to wait. Since check-in was delayed, we decided to head out for lunch and some sightseeing. When we returned around 4pm, I was still asked to wait another 10 to 15 minutes before I could check in. The initial staff member who handled my check-in wasn’t particularly friendly or helpful, which was disappointing.

However, I’d like to sincerely thank Vinh Huang, who was very kind and accommodating. He made the extra effort to arrange a comfortable and pleasant room for us, and his warm attitude made a big difference to our stay.

One area that really needs improvement is the swimming pool. It was in poor condition — I saw floating plasters and a lot of hair in the water, which made it quite unappealing to use.

Overall, the hospitality from Vinh Huang was a highlight, but there’s room for improvement in service consistency and pool cleanliness.
reviews.response:
Dear Pyae,

Thank you for sharing your feedback about your recent experience with us. We sincerely apologize for the initial difficulties you encountered during check-in, from the trouble finding your booking to the extended wait times at both 12 PM and 4 PM. This is certainly not the smooth and welcoming start we want for any of our guests, and we are truly sorry that the initial front desk interaction was not friendly or helpful.

We are, however, very pleased to hear about the positive impact that Vinh Hung had on your stay. It’s wonderful to know that he went the extra mile to arrange a comfortable and pleasant room for you and that his warm attitude made a significant difference. We will be sure to commend Vinh Hung for his exceptional service and dedication.

Your comments highlight areas where we clearly need to improve, particularly concerning our check-in process and staff training. Please be assured that we are taking your feedback seriously and will use it to address these i

reviews.title: Value for money
reviews.text: Let me start this review by saying the Imperial Hotel is not really a 5 star hotel. I do believe however that this hotel is actually very good value for money. Certainly the price I paid would allow me to recommend this hotel without any hesitation.

Also, watch the extras.  We had our laundry done here, and it ended up costing us $50 for a modest amount of clothing for two people.  We're talking an amount of laundry that would have cost $10 at a wash and fold in New York City (and that mainly because the amount of clothing would be subject to the minimum charge). reviews.title: Almost 5-star hotel...  But pleasant experience
reviews.text:
I booked this hotel based on the attractive selling rate / promotion and also great reviews.  Here is my summary of my 3-night stay here.

Location:  Good central location although not along the river, it is not far and from your room, you can see the view of the river.  There is a night market by the bridge, which is worth a visit.

Lobby and Reception:  I like the decoration there.  The ceiling is high and is really reflecting its name "Imperial".  There is one cafe and a japanese restaurant there.  I didn't try both but on one occasion there was an event with locals and they sang karaoke so loudly.

Room:  Very nice and the size is big.  The quality of linen used is good and the mattress is still in good condition.  The only comment is the bathroom.  Although there is a dedicated bathtub and a shower room, the washing basin and area could be a little bigger.

Housekeeper:  Great and prompt service.  I could have given them a full five stars but there was one day that they forgot to provide us a turn down service.

Food and Beverage:  We booked room only. So we couldn't rate this.  But I tried to go to their rooftop restaurant one time at 6 pm for a drink but it wasn't open yet.  This should give you a pleasant view of the city.

Staff in general:  pleasant...  but they could have improved their english language a bit to become a real 5-star hotel.
reviews.positives: Nice decor, room size, facilities provided

reviews.title: Great hotel with great location
reviews.text:
we had a great time in imperial hotel hué. rooms are comfortable with very nice view, location is very good and breakfast is excellent. just in front of the hotel you can rent bicycle for the day and you can find the "stop and go" restaurant (which moved) to organise tours and visits or car renting).
when we arrived, wifi connection in the room was not stable and by mentioning that to the front desk, they sent someone to install a wifi modem directly in the room which gave us a perfect connection.
in the lobby you find free access to computers with internet and printing facilities.
reviews.positives: Nice view, big and comfortables rooms, Nice breakfast, good room service food, great location (walking distance: 2 minutes from the river, 20 minutes from citadelle, 7 minutes from 'routard center' with all restaurants and bars)

reviews.title: Nice getaway in the Imperial City
reviews.positives: Piscine agréable, rooftop offrant une belle vue sur Hué, l'emplacement est un gros atout. Les chambres sont très spacieuses. De plus, le hall d'entrée est impressionnant.
reviews.negatives: Petit-déjeuner typique asiatique, principalement composé de plats chauds. Je n'ai pas eu de chance : à chaque fois que je montais dans ma chambre, la carte ne fonctionnait pas, donc je me retrouvais bloquée devant la porte et je devais redescendre à l'accueil. Finalement, ils ont fait venir un technicien qui a simplement changé les piles du boîtier de la porte mais ils ne se sont pas excusés pour le désagrément. Et enfin si vous souhaitez dormir le matin, pensez à l’indiquer, sinon ils sonnent à 8h30 pour faire le ménage !

reviews.title: Superior Hotel and Location
reviews.text: the hotel was well located in hue. all of the restaurants and shopping were within a few blocks of the hotel and it was a short walk to the hue citadel which is the main site in the city center. the river is nearby and from there boats will take you up river to the royal mausoleums and other points of interest. the rooms were very comfortable and well maintained. the staff generally were helpful
reviews.positives: Rooms & Location

reviews.title: Très bien placé et bon petit déjeuner
reviews.positives: L'établissement est très bien placé avec tous les services et restaurants à proximité. Le personnel est courtois et efficace. La chambre était parfaite quant à sa taille, le mobilier classique et une très jolie vue sur la rivière des parfums. La salle de bains était propre et bien équipée. Le petit déjeuner en buffet était parfait avec beaucoup de choix.
reviews.negatives: Un manque d'entretien manifeste. La salle du petit déjeuner, la terrasse extérieure, l'espace piscine, la salle de sport sont négligés et pas très propres. Tout comme la chambre, peintures salies, têtes de lit tachées, traces de doigts sur les vitres. Une odeur de désodorisant très présente dans les parties communes. Literie pas très confortables on sent les ressorts du matelas.

reviews.title: Wonderful Views
reviews.text: Imperial Hotel is located in the center of Hue. It seems to be the tallest building in the neighborhood and therefore has a commanding view of the city in the higher floors. The Perfume River is only 5 minutes walk down the road. The Citadel is 1km away so is within walking distance. It has an attractive bar on the top floor; however service standard of the staff in there is below par. The night we were in there they turned on the TV and a music player (Asian pop) at the same time so there was a cacophony of sound that made quiet enjoyment impossible. They did not open the cans of Tiger beer we ordered (at USD3.50 each which is top price by Vietnam standards), let alone pour it for us. However staff in the other departments (reception, housekeeping) are excellent.
reviews.positives:
1. Wonderful views of the Perfume River from the river facing rooms
2. Within walking distance to the Citadel (1Km)
3. Centrally located within walking distance to a range of restaurants and shops
4. Rooms are spacious and well appointed
reviews.negatives: Uneven service standard amongst staff - some excellent and some indifferent

reviews.title: Imperial Hotel
reviews.text: THe hotel is a four star hotel, not a five star hotel because of the service. This is a problem in Vietnam as all travelers can attest to. The service is not bad, but it is not up to the standard of a five star hotel. The internet stations are in the lobby area and the bar with very loud music is next to the lobby with no door so using the internet at night was annoying. We stayed for 3 nights and there was a special of stay two nights and get the third free so this was the best hotel for the price in all of Vietnam.

reviews.title: More like a 4-star hotel
reviews.text: It was a nice experience although nothing was special.  The room rate was very good given the spacious room.  However, the windows were so dirty.  Breakfast has various selections, but more like a 4-star hotel.  The supervisor at front desk was not as helpful as her staff.  Overall, it was good.  I would stay there again with the similar rate.
reviews.positives: The room rate, breakfast, staff.

reviews.title: Very good
reviews.positives:
Bel hôtel à Hué
Le lobby, dans un style impérial élégant, donne tout de suite une belle impression de raffinement.
Le personnel est professionnel, et toujours disponible pour aider.
La chambre est spacieuse, propre et confortable même si un peu minimaliste. L’emplacement est excellent : idéal pour visiter les principaux sites et profiter du centre-ville le soir.
Le petit-déjeuner est très bon, avec notamment un excellent bún bò Huế et un bon choix de spécialités locales ou plus classiques.
Petits points à noter : on peut parfois entendre un léger bruit de la rue (mais Hué reste une ville calme), et il n’y a pas de pommeau de douche, ni dans la douche ni dans la baignoire.
Il y a aussi un casino dans le lobby et une salle de jeux pour les enfants.
Dans l’ensemble, un très bon séjour et un hôtel que je recommande pour Hué.

reviews.title: a great hotel in Hue
reviews.text:
We was told to take the shuttle bus from the airport to hotel. However, the shuttle bus stop about 1km from hotel. Luckily, the weather is good to have slow walk to hotel. 

Upon reaching hotel, we are greeted and the staff is very fast in checking us. The command of English is one of the best we encontered in Vietnam. 

The room is nice and huge. We are impressed.

The location is not bad as it is beside the main road bridge to the old city. However, it is a bit further from the hotel cluster, which are more happening. 

Across the road, there is a 'stop and go' cafe, which offer quite nice local food. They also help to organise tours or arrange transportation. 

The breakfast is not so up to standard for a 5 star hotel. There are root top bar, which look good but we didn't try.

For the price, it worth the stay.
reviews.positives: Deco and size of room

reviews.text:
Imperial 
Excellent hotel in a perfect location.
This place is excellent value. The rooms are high quality, kept well and have great views. The hotel itself is in fine condition and has great style. Staff brilliant. Only problem is the chef. He is terrible. Can't cook an omelette, can't plate up a dish and over cooks everything. But who cares.. Usually eat out anyway. Other  than the kitchen the hotel is great and definitely worth the price.
